name: stackra/activity
purpose: Tenant-facing activity feed — thin wrapper around spatie/laravel-activitylog with tenant scoping, ULID prefix act_, and tier-based retention.
capabilities: Activity model with BelongsToTenant + ULID prefix act_
Tenant + user HTTP surface via spatie query builder
when_to_use: A model needs a who-did-what product feed visible to tenant admins and users with tier-driven retention.
when_not_to_use: For compliance-grade evidence with 7-year retention, use stackra/audit — activity is UX, audit is evidence.
